role: Core utility modules supporting file synchronization, CLI presentation, user interaction, cryptographic footprints, atomic file operations, Git hook management, process locking, and path normalization for the ArchSpine system.
responsibility: Provides a comprehensive set of reusable infrastructure components that enable reliable file system operations, deterministic structural hashing, interactive CLI prompts, branded output, agent instruction management, pre-commit hook lifecycle, and exclusive runtime access control.

children.role: Utility module providing file-level synchronization and removal operations for ArchSpine agent instruction blocks and configuration sections across repository configuration files.
Static configuration module providing agent instruction blocks and repository ignore patterns for the ArchSpine system.
TypeScript barrel export module providing a unified public API for agent instruction utilities.
CLI presentation utility for rendering branded banners and version information.
CLI utility module for interactive user confirmation prompts and terminal input handling.
Utility module for generating deterministic structural fingerprints of source code files.
Infrastructure utility class providing atomic file write and safe file copy operations for the ArchSpine system.
Infrastructure utility module for managing the ArchSpine pre-commit Git hook installation lifecycle.
Infrastructure utility providing file-based mutual exclusion for runtime operations across the ArchSpine system.
Internal utility function providing cross-platform repository path normalization for consistent database key representation.
